tasks.title: event_id reinicia após navegação
tasks.description: Make event_id monotonic within a recording session. Currently evt_0001 appears multiple times after navigation. Fix: use global counter in RecorderController that never resets.

tasks.title: Sessões diferentes anexadas no mesmo recording
tasks.description: Prevent record --name X from silently appending to existing recordings. If recordings/X exists, create recordings/X_2 instead. Never merge silently.

tasks.title: Browser Playwright bloqueado sem fallback corporativo
tasks.description: Add --browser edge|chrome|chromium flag. Fallback chain: chromium → channel=msedge → channel=chrome → connect_over_cdp. For CAIXA corporate environment.

tasks.title: Tela pisca/recarrega no SIMAX durante gravação
tasks.description: Distinguish click vs submit vs postback in recorder. For ASP classic pages: detect form postback as intentional navigation. Avoid page reload flicker.

tasks.title: Digitação caractere por caractere gera dezenas de fills
tasks.description: Compact sequential fill events. For same selector within 500ms window, keep only the final value. Add _compact_fill_events() method in RecordingNormalizer.

tasks.title: goto() excessivo no script gerado
tasks.description: Remove redundant page.goto() calls from generated scripts. Only use goto at start and when action actually causes navigation. Use expect_navigation for intentional navigations.

tasks.title: Healer sugere candidatos genéricos (text=Selecione)
tasks.description: Add _is_generic_text() with list of penalized texts: Selecione, OK, Cancelar, Página inicial, Calcular. Score reduced to 0.10 for generic text without scope context.

tasks.title: Métricas de healing inconsistentes
tasks.description: Separate metrics: falhas_detectadas, healings_tentados, aplicados, validados, rejeitados. Per-step reporting, not just global totals. Fix MetricsRepository display.

tasks.title: Assertions frágeis por CSS estrutural longo
tasks.description: Prefer semantic assertions: page.get_by_text(), page.get_by_role(), page.locator('body').to_contain_text(). CSS structural chains only as last resort.

tasks.title: Elementos com bounding box zero aceitos como alvo
tasks.description: Validate actionability: visible, enabled, area > 0, not covered by overlay. If element fails, climb to actionable ancestor. Reject targets with bb width=height=0.

tasks.title: Dependência httpx ausente no pyproject.toml
tasks.description: Add httpx>=0.27 to pyproject.toml dependencies. Verify clean install works: pip install -e . && python -c 'from testforge.healing.llm_client import chat'.

tasks.title: URL com & quebra no PowerShell
tasks.description: Add URL validation: if URL contains & without quotes, warn user. Detect truncated URL (ending in ?param=). PowerShell-specific guidance.

tasks.title: Logs truncados demais (candidates: [:h...)
tasks.description: Terminal shows summary. Save full execution report to runs/<recording_id>/<timestamp>/execution_report.json with complete candidate lists.

tasks.title: Steps pulados não explicados (Step 14 → Step 17)
tasks.description: Log skip reason for every omitted step: 'Step N: skipped — duplicate compacted', 'Step N: skipped — empty selector', 'Step N: skipped — non-actionable target'.

tasks.title: Compile sem artefato semântico auditável
tasks.description: Generate semantic_steps.jsonl alongside the script during compile. Contains normalized steps for auditing. Document contract between raw_events, steps, and semantic_steps.

tasks.title: Runner continua após falhas críticas de estado
tasks.description: If UF selection fails, Edifício/Data should be marked as blocked_by_previous_failure, not executed independently. Add step dependency: blocking=true + depends_on=step_N.

tasks.title: Contrato instável raw_events vs steps vs semantic_steps
tasks.description: Document the contract: raw_events.jsonl (raw capture), steps.jsonl (manual/curated/asserts), semantic_steps.jsonl (compiled output, NEW), script.py (executable render). Add validation in compile.

tasks.title: Intent Completeness Contract — estados, checker, relatório
tasks.description: Sprint 1 do plano intent_readiness. RecordingStatus enum, IntentCompletenessChecker, relatório JSON+MD, 20 testes, CLI blocking para gravações incompletas.
tasks.test: source activate.sh && python -m pytest tests/test_intent_completeness.py tests/test_recorder_unit.py -q
